name: open-planning-poker-website
description: Open Planning Poker — free and open-source agile estimation tool. Landing page built with Tailwind CSS and Flowbite.

scripts.build: tailwindcss build input.css -o dist/output.css --minify && cp index.html dist/ && cp robots.txt dist/ && cp sitemap.xml dist/ && cp -r images dist/ && cp site.webmanifest dist/ && cp browserconfig.xml dist/ && cp 404.html dist/

author: Bojan Piskulic
